description.ko: 보이지 않는 소리가 새겨진 채널을 따라 드문 색의 맥박으로 질주하며, 침묵을 리듬감 있는 압력 회로로 바꾼다.
description.en: Invisible sound races through etched channels as sparse color-coded pulses, turning silence into a rhythmic pressure circuit.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization rendered as a silent microfluidic resonance chip on a frost-white laboratory surface, viewed in a precise macro top-down composition. The chip contains an irregular maze of ultra-thin etched channels, but no visible source of sound; invisible frequencies reveal themselves as #4169E1 royal-blue hairline pulses sprinting through the channels in broken rhythmic bursts. At sudden beat impacts, the blue lines split into sharp #FF4500 orange forked accents and tiny clipped corners, suggesting rapid vibration without any moving object. A few #FFD700 gold phase beads appear only where two channels briefly synchronize, while rare #32CD32 lime-green gate marks flash at abrupt pitch jumps. Keep the particle count extremely low: most of the image is quiet white space, clear acrylic edges, subtle refraction, crisp micro-shadows, offset echo traces, and fast staccato line behavior. Minimal, high-contrast, rhythmic resonance in silence, with vibrating frequencies made visible as controlled graphic pressure paths.
